## Memory & Conversation

<CodeBlock b64="" />

<Quiz question="User chatted 50 messages about vacation planning, then asks 'What hotel did I mention?' Which memory strategy helps?" options={["Keep all 50 messages in context","Sliding window of last 10 only","Summary + entity extraction (hotels, dates, preferences)","Tell user you don't remember"]} correctIndex={2} explanation="Entity extraction from older messages captures specific facts (hotel names, dates) even after those messages are summarized away." />
